replies.msg:
Awake is an adjective here.

If he were awake = it is a hypothetical situation.

It is similar to “If I were you, I would do this”: I cannot possibly be you, but in this imaginary situation that I were you, I would do this or that.

Google “subjective mood” for more.

Awake is an adjective here.

If he were awake = it is a hypothetical situation.

It is similar to “If I were you, I would do this”: I cannot possibly be you, but in this imaginary situation that I were you, I would do this or that.

Google “subjective mood” for more.

he were awake right now
呢句既grammar點理解
thanks

Awake is an adjective here.

If he were awake = it is a hypothetical situation.

It is similar to “If I were you, I would do this”: I cannot possibly be you, but in this imaginary situation that I were you, I would do this or that.

Google “subjective mood” for more.
